title: senecio littoreus var. hispidulus
intro: Senecio littoreus var. hispidulus, also known as Coast Groundsel, is a variety of the Senecio littoreus plant, a type of flowering plant in the daisy family. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including the presence of pyrrolizidine alkaloids, which have been traditionally used to treat digestive issues and as a purgative. The health benefits of Coast Groundsel include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which may help to reduce swelling and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Coast Groundsel can be found in various forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedy.
